title: BABY SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM BABY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers and formula. Also offers access to used clothing, depending on availability. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Residents who self-identify as low income Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424, 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Formula/Baby Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
